name: Merit Excellence Award
essayPrompt: Describe your academic goals and how this scholarship will help you achieve them. (500 words)

name: First-Generation Scholar Grant
essayPrompt: Tell us about your first-generation background and how it has shaped your educational journey. (400 words)

name: STEM Innovation Scholarship
essayPrompt: Describe an innovative STEM project you've worked on or would like to pursue. (600 words)

name: Diversity & Inclusion Award
essayPrompt: How do you contribute to a diverse and inclusive community? (450 words)

name: Financial Need Scholarship
essayPrompt: Explain your financial circumstances and how this scholarship would impact your education. (400 words)

name: Business Leadership Award
essayPrompt: Describe a leadership role you've held and what you learned from it. (500 words)

name: Environmental Sustainability Grant
essayPrompt: How do you plan to make a positive environmental impact in your career? (450 words)

name: Community Service Scholarship
essayPrompt: Describe your community service work and its significance to you. (400 words)

name: Women in STEM Award
essayPrompt: Share your experiences and aspirations in STEM fields. (500 words)

name: General Academic Excellence Scholarship
essayPrompt: What does academic excellence mean to you? (350 words)

name: Engineering Future Leaders
essayPrompt: Where do you see yourself as a leader in engineering 10 years from now? (550 words)

name: Low-Income Access Fund
essayPrompt: How has financial constraint affected your educational path, and how will this scholarship help? (500 words)

name: Transfer Student Excellence
essayPrompt: Why are you transferring, and what are your goals at our institution? (450 words)

name: Computer Science Innovators
essayPrompt: Describe a software project or coding innovation that excites you. (500 words)

name: Rural Student Opportunity Grant
essayPrompt: How has growing up in a rural community shaped your educational aspirations? (450 words)
